calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-17-2022 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. NICHOLAS MORTL, Esq. of Hunt & Henriques (Tel: 800-680-2426) for plaintiff;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

Plaintiff stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem deciding the matter. The Judge Pro Tem and plaintiff's counsel (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Requests for Admission, Set One, Nos. 1-9 are deemed admitted. Moving party is reminded to comply with Local Rule 2.7 and the notice published on the Law & Motion and Discovery page of the Court's website regarding the email submission of courtesy copy of all papers. Failure to comply may result in continuance or denial of future motions.

Plaintiff counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order in both .pdf and Word formats to the Judge Pro Tem by email sent to noah@ndllegal.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Set For Trial On Feb-22-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
